issues_found: Line 191: PlaygroundWrap structure verified - CORRECT (canvas sub-component properly uses object config with variants)
Line 445: CollapseBlock has type mismatch - string keys with number default
Line 517: NegMarginBox has type mismatch - mixed string/number keys with number default
Multiple components missing required sub-components in PlaygroundWrap pattern

missing_sub_components.description: Components using PlaygroundWrap pattern should have these sub-components: controls, canvas, codeline, label

missing: label (p:label exists in sub but no standalone label sub-component)
affected_components.note: Canvas sub-component correctly has nested variants for layout

numeric_variant_type_mismatches.description: Components with numeric variant keys must use numeric defaultVariants (not strings)

issues.issue_type: Type mismatch: string keys vs number default

margin.note: These are actually being treated as strings in the config

issues.problem: TypeScript will treat keys as strings ('2', '4', '8', '12') but defaultVariants uses number (8). This creates a type mismatch.

fix_recommendation.description: Ensure keys and defaultVariants use the same type
fix_recommendation.approach: Use numeric keys (unquoted) to match numeric default

example.note: Keys must be unquoted numbers, not quoted strings

issues.issue_type: Type mismatch: mixed string/number keys vs number default

neg.inconsistency: CRITICAL - 0 is number but '-2', '-4', etc. are strings

issues.problem: CRITICAL: The variant keys mix numeric (0) and string ('-2', '-4') types. JavaScript will treat 0 as number but '-2' as string. This breaks type safety.

fix_recommendation.description: Standardize all keys to one type - recommend STRING for semantic clarity
fix_recommendation.approach: Convert 0 to '0' and update defaultVariants to '0'

example.note: All keys including 0 must be quoted strings to match defaultVariants type

line_191_analysis.description: Detailed analysis of Line 191: PlaygroundWrap 'canvas' sub-component

structure.canvas: defined as object config with base + variants + defaultVariants

analysis.why: This is proper object config syntax for a sub-component with its own variants. The 'canvas' sub-component can have independent variants that work alongside parent component variants.
analysis.reference: Per tailwind-styled-v4-guidelines.md: 'Sub-components can have their own variants — enabling deeply customizable component trees'

line_191_analysis.note: The structure is: PlaygroundWrap { canvas: { base: '...', variants: {...}, defaultVariants: {...} } } which is the recommended advanced pattern

CollapseMargin_analysis.issue: Keys are strings but default is number - TypeScript will reject this
CollapseMargin_analysis.reason: Numeric variants should use numeric types for semantic clarity and type safety

NegMarginVal_analysis.key_types: MIXED - includes both number (0) and strings ('-2', '-4', '-8', '-12')
NegMarginVal_analysis.issue: CRITICAL: 0 is number but '-2' is string. JavaScript treats these as different types.
NegMarginVal_analysis.reason: Negative values are semantically strings in CSS ('margin: -2'); using all strings prevents type confusion

fixes_required.type: Type mismatch - string keys, numeric default
fixes_required.change_type: Replace string keys with numeric keys

before.issue: Keys are interpreted as strings but defaultVariants uses number

after.explanation: Keys 2, 4, 8, 12 must be unquoted (numbers) to match numeric defaultVariants

fixes_required.type: Type mismatch - mixed string/number keys, numeric default
fixes_required.change_type: Convert all keys to strings, update defaultVariants

before.issue: Key 0 is numeric but '-2', '-4', etc. are strings. Mixed types break type safety.

after.explanation: All keys including 0 must be quoted strings ('0', not 0) to match string variants. Update defaultVariants to '0'.

review_items.current: variants: { active: { true: '...', false: '...' } }, defaultVariants: { active: 'false' }
review_items.problem: Boolean variant keys (true/false) should use boolean defaultVariants (false), not string 'false'
review_items.fix: Change defaultVariants: { active: 'false' } to defaultVariants: { active: false }

type_safety: Use numeric keys (unquoted) for numeric variants: { 1: '...', 2: '...', 3: '...' }
Use string keys (quoted) for named variants: { 'small': '...', 'large': '...' }
Use boolean keys for toggle states: { true: '...', false: '...' }
Always match defaultVariants type to variant key type

guidelines_reference: tailwind-styled-v4-guidelines.md - Advanced Features - Sub-Components with Nested Variants
Boolean, Number & String Variants — Type Safety section
